## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Problem

What problem does this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe your preferred solution.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or approaches you have considered.

## Scope alignment

Explain how this idea fits the current scope of Urlopomat.

## Additional context

Add examples, API ideas, business rules, or any other useful context here.
